title: Trump fires Attorney General Pam Bondi
shortDescription: Trump fired Attorney General Pam Bondi after controversies over withholding Jeffrey Epstein documents and the dismissal of charges against Democrats.

title: Why is Trump talking about Tiger Woods? They connect on more than golf
shortDescription: President Donald Trump said he has talked to Tiger Woods since the golfer crashed and was charged with a DUI. Woods is dating Vanessa Trump, Kai's mom

title: Trump sued by Dems, advocates over mail-in voting restrictions
shortDescription: A series of voting rights groups and top Democrats have sued President Donald Trump to block his executive order restricting mail-in voting.

title: Senators rip putting Trump's signature on US money amid economic woes
shortDescription: In a letter to Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent, the senators suggest the move may be intended to distract the public from their economic struggles.

shortDescription: California’s Riverside County Sheriff Chad Bianco is investigating the 2025 election in which Democrats were given the green light to redistrict.

title: Trump tells Iran to make a deal 'before it is too late'

title: Trump's ballroom getting a vote as judge orders construction stopped

title: What did Trump say in his speech? What to know about Iran address
shortDescription: In a 19-minute address, the president gave little indication on the Iran war's conclusion but promised gas price hikes would be a 'short-term' problem

title: Pastor likens Trump's experiences to Jesus

title: Trump says Iran war is 'nearing completion' but not done in speech
